description: Appeals workflow with human queue, SLA timer, moderator roles, and transparency report auto-generation. Also: safety microfeatures (one-tap Hide/Mute/Block/Report, take-a-break surface, mass-unfollow protection, self-harm safe-search redirect, crisis hotline localization, grooming pattern detection). Plus DPIA legal document.
steps: 1. Enhance packages/moderation/src/services/appeal-workflow.ts: Add SLA timer (configurable per priority: critical=1h, high=4h, medium=24h, low=72h). Add slaDeadline field to AppealRecord. Add methods: getOverdueCases(), escalateOverdue(), assignToNextAvailable(reviewerPool). Add moderator role check (role: 'moderator'|'senior_moderator'|'legal').

2. Create packages/moderation/src/services/appeals-queue.ts: AppealsQueue class. Priority queue with SLA-ordered dequeue. Methods: enqueue(appeal, priority), dequeue(reviewerId) -> next case by SLA urgency, getQueueStats() -> {pending, inProgress, overdue, avgResolutionTime}, getReviewerWorkload(reviewerId). Supports filtering by category.

3. Create packages/moderation/src/services/safety-microfeatures.ts: SafetyMicrofeatures class with: (a) oneTopAction(userId, targetId, action: 'hide'|'mute'|'block'|'report') - escalating outcome pattern, (b) detectDistressPatterns(usageMetrics) -> {showBreakSurface: boolean, reason}, (c) massUnfollowProtection(userId, unfollowCount, timeWindow) -> {blocked: boolean, reason}, (d) selfHarmRedirect(query) -> {redirect: boolean, hotlineUrl, hotlineNumber}, (e) getCrisisHotline(countryCode) -> {number, url, name} with localized data for 20+ countries, (f) detectGroomingPatterns(messages) -> {risk: number, indicators: string[]}

4. Create packages/moderation/src/services/grooming-detector.ts: GroomingPatternDetector that analyzes conversation patterns for grooming indicators: age gap questions, isolation language, secrecy demands, gift/money mentions with minors, escalating intimacy patterns. Uses keyword lists + structural pattern matching (not ML - deterministic rules for legal defensibility).

5. Enhance packages/moderation/src/services/transparency-report.ts: Add quarterly auto-generation with: total actions by type, appeal outcomes, average resolution time, top violation categories, false positive rate (from appeals overturned), geographic distribution. Add exportAsMarkdown() method for public posting.

6. Create docs/legal/dpia.md: Data Protection Impact Assessment document covering: what personal data is processed, lawful basis, retention periods, who has access, data flows, risk assessment, mitigation measures. Cover all Phase 20 systems (CSAM scanning, fingerprinting, behavioral analysis, age verification).

7. Create tests: appeals-queue.test.ts (SLA ordering, overdue detection, workload distribution), safety-microfeatures.test.ts (distress detection, mass-unfollow protection, crisis hotline lookup), grooming-detector.test.ts (pattern detection accuracy)
8. Update packages/moderation/src/index.ts to export AppealsQueue, SafetyMicrofeatures, GroomingPatternDetector
acceptance_criteria: AppealsQueue dequeues cases in SLA-urgency order (most overdue first)
SLA timer marks cases as overdue when deadline passes
At least one moderator role exists with ability to resolve appeals
SafetyMicrofeatures.oneTopAction escalates from hide -> mute -> block -> report correctly
GroomingPatternDetector identifies at least 3 grooming indicators in test conversation
Crisis hotline returns correct number for US (988), UK (116 123), and at least 18 other countries
DPIA document exists at docs/legal/dpia.md with required sections
pnpm turbo typecheck test build --filter=@quant/moderation passes
